revision.comment: better way to allow parameter to exist on individual lines
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Articles needing expert attention with no reason or talk parameter]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Articles needing unspecified expert attention]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expert_needed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||Expert needed|date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Expert needed | subst= {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | sect = {{{2|}}} | issue= '''needs attention from an expert {{#if:{{{1|}}} |in {{trim|{{{1}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex2|}}} |{{#if:{{{ex3|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex2}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex4|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex3}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex5|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex4}}}}} or {{trim|{{{ex5}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex4}}}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex3}}}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex2}}}}}}} |}} |on the subject}}'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}} |The specific problem is: '''{{{reason}}}.''' }} {{#if:{{{talk|}}} |See the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{talk}}}|talk page]] for details. |{{#if:{{{reason|}}}| |Please add a ''reason'' or a ''talk'' parameter to this template to explain the issue with the {{{2|article}}}.{{category handler|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|main=}} }} }} |fix={{#if: {{{1|}}} |[[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex2|}}} |{{#if:{{{ex3|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex4|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex5|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}]] or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex5}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex5}}}}}]] | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}]]}} | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}]]}} | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}]]}} |}} may be able to help recruit an expert. |
''When placing this tag, consider [[:Template:Expert needed#Parameters|associating this request]] with a [[WP:WikiProject|WikiProject]].''{{category handler|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|main=}} }} | date = {{{date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}} | cat = Articles needing expert attention | all = All articles needing expert attention }}{{category handler |nocat={{{nocat|true}}} |main={{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{1|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex2|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex3|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex4|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex5|}}}}} }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] \n{{Draft categories| }} \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||Expert needed|date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Expert needed | subst= {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | sect = {{{2|}}} | issue= '''needs attention from an expert {{#if:{{{1|}}} |in {{trim|{{{1}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex2|}}} |{{#if:{{{ex3|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex2}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex4|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex3}}}}}{{#if:{{{ex5|}}} |, {{trim|{{{ex4}}}}} or {{trim|{{{ex5}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex4}}}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex3}}}}}}} |{{sp}}or {{trim|{{{ex2}}}}}}} |}} |on the subject}}'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}} |The specific problem is: '''{{{reason}}}.''' }} {{#if:{{{talk|}}} |See the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}#{{{talk}}}|talk page]] for details. |{{#if:{{{reason|}}}| |Please add a ''reason'' or a ''talk'' parameter to this template to explain the issue with the {{{2|article}}}.{{category handler|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|main=}} }} }} |fix={{#if: {{{1|}}} |[[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex2|}}} |{{#if:{{{ex3|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex4|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}]]{{#if:{{{ex5|}}} |, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}]] or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex5}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex5}}}}}]] | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex4}}}}}]]}} | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex3}}}}}]]}} | or [[Wikipedia:WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}|WikiProject {{ucfirst:{{{ex2}}}}}]]}} |}} may be able to help recruit an expert. |
''When placing this tag, consider [[:Template:Expert needed#Parameters|associating this request]] with a [[WP:WikiProject|WikiProject]].''{{category handler|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|main=}} }} | date = {{{date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}} | cat = Articles needing expert attention | all = All articles needing expert attention }}{{category handler |nocat={{{nocat|true}}} |main={{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{1|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex2|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex3|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex4|}}}}}{{Expert needed/catcheck|{{{ex5|}}}}} }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] \n{{Draft categories| }} \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
